A

all(List<Result<T, E>>) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Combines a list of Results, returning all success values or the first failure.
any(List<Result<T, E>>) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns the first successful Result from a list, or the last failure if all fail.

B

bind(Function<T, Maybe<U>>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Transforms the contained value using the given function that returns a Maybe.
bind(Function<T, MaybeAsync<U>>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Transforms the contained value using the given function that returns a MaybeAsync.
bind(Function<T, Result<U, E>>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Transforms the contained success value using the given function that returns a Result.
bindError(Function<E, Result<T, E2>>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Transforms the error using a function that returns a Result.

C

com.adrewdev.functional - package com.adrewdev.functional
 
compact() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Converts a Result<Unit, E> to a Maybe for error handling.

E

empty() - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns a Maybe representing the absence of a value.
ensure(Predicate<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns this Maybe if it contains a value and the predicate matches, otherwise returns None.
ensure(Predicate<T>, E) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns this Result if it contains a success value and the predicate matches, otherwise returns a Failure with the given error.
equals(Object) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Compares this Maybe with another object for equality.
equals(Object) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Compares this MaybeAsync with another object for equality.
equals(Object) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Compares this Result with another object for equality.
equals(Object) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result.Pair
 

F

failure(E) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Creates a failed Result with the given error.
failureIf(boolean, E, T) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Creates a failed Result if the condition is true.
failureIf(boolean, Supplier<E>, T) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Creates a failed Result if the condition is true, with lazy error evaluation.
first - Variable in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result.Pair
The first value in the pair.
first(Result<T, E>...) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns the first successful Result from varargs, or the first failure if all fail.
from(CompletableFuture<T>) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Creates a MaybeAsync from a CompletableFuture.
from(Supplier<T>) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Creates a MaybeAsync from a Supplier.
from(T) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Creates a Maybe from a potentially null value.
from(T) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Creates a MaybeAsync from a potentially null value.
fromOptional(Optional<T>, E) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Creates a Result from an Optional, returning Failure with the given error if the Optional is empty.
fromOptional(Optional<T>, Supplier<E>) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Creates a Result from an Optional, returning Failure with the error from the given supplier if the Optional is empty.

G

getErrorOrThrow() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns the contained error value if present, throws NoSuchElementException otherwise.
getValueOrDefault(Supplier<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns the contained value if present, or the value supplied by the given supplier if None.
getValueOrDefault(Supplier<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns the success value if present, otherwise returns the value supplied by the given supplier.
getValueOrDefault(T) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns the contained value if present, or the given default value if None.
getValueOrDefault(T) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns the success value if present, otherwise returns the given default value.
getValueOrThrow() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns the contained value if present, throws NoSuchElementException otherwise.
getValueOrThrow() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Gets the contained value if present, throws NoSuchElementException otherwise.
getValueOrThrow() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns the contained success value if present, throws NoSuchElementException otherwise.
getValueOrThrow(Supplier<String>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns the contained value if present, throws NoSuchElementException with the provided message otherwise.
getValueOrThrow(Supplier<String>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Gets the contained value if present, throws NoSuchElementException with the provided message otherwise.

Returns a hash code for this Maybe.

Returns a hash code for this Result.
hashCode() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result.Pair
 

I

isDefined() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns true if this Maybe contains a value (is Some).
isFailure() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns true if this Result represents a failed operation.
isNone() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns true if this Maybe represents the absence of a value (is None).
isSome() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns true if this Maybe contains a value (is Some).
isSuccessful() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns true if this Result represents a successful operation.

M

map(Function<T, U>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Transforms the contained value using the given function if present.

Transforms the contained value using the given function if present.

Transforms the contained success value using the given function if present.
mapError(Function<E, F>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Transforms the contained error value using the given function if present.
match(MaybeAsyncMatcher<T, R>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Performs pattern matching on this MaybeAsync.
match(MaybeMatcher<T, R>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Performs pattern matching on this Maybe.
match(Consumer<T>, Runnable) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Performs pattern matching on this Maybe with void callbacks.
match(Consumer<T>, Runnable) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Performs pattern matching on this MaybeAsync with void callbacks.
match(Consumer<T>, Consumer<E>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Performs pattern matching on this Result with void callbacks.
match(Function<T, R>, Function<E, R>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Performs pattern matching on this Result.
Maybe<T> - Class in com.adrewdev.functional
Represents a value that may be present (Some) or absent (None).
MaybeAsync<T> - Class in com.adrewdev.functional
Represents a future value that may or may not exist.
MaybeAsyncMatcher<T,R> - Interface in com.adrewdev.functional
Matcher interface for pattern matching on MaybeAsync instances.
MaybeMatcher<T,R> - Interface in com.adrewdev.functional
Matcher interface for pattern matching on Maybe instances.
merge(Result<U, E>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Merges two successful Results into a Pair, or returns the first failure.

N

none() - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns a Maybe representing the absence of a value.
none() - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Returns a MaybeAsync representing the absence of a value.

O

of(Supplier<Result<T, E>>) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Wraps a Result-returning supplier, catching any exceptions.
onNone() - Method in interface com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsyncMatcher
Called when the MaybeAsync resolves to None.
onNone() - Method in interface com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeMatcher
Called when the Maybe is None.
onSome(T) - Method in interface com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsyncMatcher
Called when the MaybeAsync resolves to Some, receiving the contained value.
onSome(T) - Method in interface com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeMatcher
Called when the Maybe is Some, receiving the contained value.
or(Maybe<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns this Maybe if it contains a value, otherwise returns the given Maybe.
or(MaybeAsync<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Returns this MaybeAsync if it resolves to a value, otherwise returns the given MaybeAsync.
or(Result<T, E>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns this Result if it contains a success value, otherwise returns the given Result.
or(Supplier<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns this Maybe if it contains a value, otherwise returns a Maybe containing the value supplied by the given supplier.
or(Supplier<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Returns this MaybeAsync if it resolves to a value, otherwise returns a MaybeAsync containing the value supplied by the given supplier.
or(Supplier<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns this Result if it contains a success value, otherwise returns a Result containing the value supplied by the given supplier.
or(T) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns this Maybe if it contains a value, otherwise returns a Maybe containing the given value.
or(T) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Returns this MaybeAsync if it resolves to a value, otherwise returns a MaybeAsync containing the given value.
or(T) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns this Result if it contains a success value, otherwise returns a Result containing the given value.
orElse(Maybe<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns this Maybe if it contains a value, otherwise returns the given Maybe.
orElse(MaybeAsync<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Returns this MaybeAsync if it resolves to a value, otherwise returns the given MaybeAsync.
orElse(Result<T, E>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns this Result if it contains a success value, otherwise returns the given Result.
orElseGet(Supplier<Result<T, E>>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns this Result if it contains a success value, otherwise returns a Result containing the value supplied by the given supplier.

Creates a new Pair with the given values.

R

recover(Function<E, T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Attempts to recover from a failure by applying a recovery function.

Represents a successful or failed operation.
Result.Pair<T,U> - Class in com.adrewdev.functional
A simple immutable pair for holding two values.

S

second - Variable in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result.Pair
The second value in the pair.
some(T) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Creates a Maybe containing the given non-null value.
some(T) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Creates a MaybeAsync containing the given non-null value.
success(T) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Creates a successful Result with the given value.
successIf(boolean, Supplier<T>, E) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Creates a successful Result if the condition is true, with lazy value evaluation.
successIf(boolean, T, E) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Creates a successful Result if the condition is true, otherwise creates a failure.

T

tap(Consumer<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Executes the given consumer with the contained value if present.
tap(Consumer<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Executes the given consumer with the contained value if present.
tap(Consumer<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Executes the given consumer with the contained success value if present.
tapError(Consumer<E>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Executes the given consumer with the contained error value if present.
tapFailure(Consumer<E>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Performs a side effect on the error value.
tapSuccess(Consumer<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Performs a side effect on the success value.
toCompletableFuture() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Returns the underlying CompletableFuture.
toMaybe() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Converts to Maybe (blocking).
toMaybeAsync() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Converts this Maybe to a MaybeAsync.
toOptional() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns the underlying Optional containing the value.
toOptional() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns the underlying Optional containing the success value.
toResult(E) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Converts this Maybe to a Result.
toResult(Supplier<E>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Converts this Maybe to a Result with lazy error evaluation.
toString() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns a string representation of this Maybe.
toString() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync
Returns a string representation of this MaybeAsync.

toString() - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns a string representation of this Result.
try_(Supplier<T>, Function<Throwable, E>) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Executes a supplier that may throw an exception, converting it to a Result.
tryFirst(List<T>) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns a Maybe containing the first element of the list, or None if the list is null or empty.
tryLast(List<T>) - Static method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns a Maybe containing the last element of the list, or None if the list is null or empty.

W

where(Predicate<T>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe
Returns this Maybe if it contains a value and the predicate matches, otherwise returns None.
where(Predicate<T>, Function<T, E>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Returns this Result if it contains a success value and the predicate matches, otherwise returns a Failure with the error from the given function.

Z

zip(Result<T2, E>, BiFunction<T, T2, R>) - Method in class com.adrewdev.functional.Result
Combines this Result with another Result using the given combiner function.
